---
title: "CV"
---

# 📄 Resume

👉 [Download My Resume](files/zhuolun wu resume 2026.pdf)

---

## 💼 Summary

- Data Analyst with experience in Python, SQL, and BI tools  
- Strong background in statistical modeling and visualization  
- Experience in AI, smart city, and business analytics projects  

---

## 🧰 Technical Skills

- Programming: Python, R, SQL, Java  
- Tools: Tableau, Power BI, Excel  
- Systems: Linux  
- Analytics: Regression, Clustering, ML  

---

## 🌐 Languages

- English  
- Mandarin Chinese  
- Japanese
